{{Infobox character
| name = Seishen Daji
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
| name = Seishen Daji
| aliases = Prince Daji, Daji
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord, Prince, surviving heir to the Seishen royal family
| abilities = swordsmanship, Ruler construct, Striker bindings, Striker attacks
| affiliations = Seishen Kingdom
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

''See also: [[Seishen Daji Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seishen]] Daji, also known as Prince Daji, is the second prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the younger brother of Kiro. Described as having a wolf-like appearance and temperament, he was characterized by intense aggression, a craving for combat, and an arrogant personality. As an [[Underlord]], he utilized dual swords and specialized armor that could be reinforced by his father's techniques. Daji was involved in an assassination attempt against [[Akura Mercy]] and Pride, acting under the recruitment of [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]]. Following this betrayal, he was captured by the [[Akura clan]] and subjected to significant punishment, including spiritual agony. After being defeated in a duel by [[Lindon]], he was eventually returned to the [[Seishen Kingdom]] as the sole surviving heir. Upon his return, Daji appeared fundamentally changed; while he regained his physical strength and resemblance to his former self, his characteristic wild aggression was replaced by a hollow, obedient demeanor. He expressed profound remorse for his disloyalty and claimed to have been transformed into the type of brother his deceased sibling deserved.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The son of [[King Dakata]] and younger brother to Kiro, [[Seishen]] Daji has recently ascended to the rank of [[Underlord]]. His tutors have noted a savage style of swordsmanship, often utilizing dual blades or a combination of a left-hand [[sword]] and a shield drawn from his [[soulspace]]. In combat, he employs [[Striker]] bindings and wears specialized armor provided by his father that offers enforcement without the cost of [[madra]], featuring a [[Ruler construct]] capable of launching stone missiles. During his exploits, he demonstrated the ability to act freely even while [[Mercy]]'s [[sacred arts]] were sealed and was seen being carried within an owl. Ultimately, he was found contained inside a squirming black cocoon behind a wall.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji is Kiro's little brother.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] is the little brother of Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] is a newly minted [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji is the younger brother of Kiro and son of [[King Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]]'s swordsmanship was described as savage by his tutors.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji uses armor given to him by his father that Enforces him without costing [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji's armor]] has a [[Ruler construct]] that launches stone missiles.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji carries swords in both hands.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji was able to act freely while [[Mercy]]'s [[sacred arts]] were sealed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji uses [[Striker]] bindings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji uses a left-hand [[sword]] and a shield from his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji can fire a beam of blue lightning from his [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] are helmeted warriors.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] was behind a wall.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]] was contained within a squirming black cocoon.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji was carried in an owl.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Prince Daji is a wolf-like young man from the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the younger brother of Prince Kiro. He is a combatant who utilizes [[Striker]] attacks fueled by bright, crackling [[madra]]. Destined to kill [[Lindon]], he directed a glare toward [[Mercy]] and Pride during his appearances.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Daji is a person who will kill [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Daji is a wolf-like young man and the younger brother to Prince Kiro.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Prince Daji is from the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Daji uses [[Striker]] attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Daji's [[madra]] is bright and crackling.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Daji glared at [[Mercy]] and Pride.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Seishen]] Daji is a member of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the son of King [[Seishen Dakata]]. During the events of this chronicle, he finds himself in captivity. While held, [[Mercy]] manages to take a teleportation anchor from him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Seishen Daji]] has been captured.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Seishen Daji]] is the son of King [[Seishen Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Daji is [[Seishen Daji]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Daji is a member of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] took a teleportation anchor from Daji.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A lean and strong prince with a sharp face and wild hair, [[Seishen]] Daji is the surviving heir to the [[Seishen]] royal family. After once plotting against the children of a [[Monarch]], he was recruited by [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]] to assist in an assassination attempt against Pride and [[Akura Mercy]]. Following this failed mission, Daji was imprisoned, leaving him with madra channels that appear torn and stitched together. Although he is an [[Underlord]], his blood essence is weaker than expected, and the perception of his father lingers over his soul. Described as a [[construct]] wearing human skin, he eventually served as a guard for Kiro.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seishen Daji]] is the surviving heir to the [[Seishen]] royal family.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seishen Daji]] was recruited by [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]] to aid an assassination attempt against [[Akura Mercy]] and Pride.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seishen Daji]] was imprisoned for his role in an assassination attempt.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji's madra channels are scarred as if they had been torn apart and stitched together.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji's blood essence is weaker than it should be for an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji is a prince.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji once plotted against a [[Monarch's children]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji's father's perception hovers over his soul.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji is described as lean and strong with wild hair and a sharp face.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji is described as a [[construct]] wearing human skin.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji guarded Kiro.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Daji said, "This is a battlefield, not a playground," firing a beam of blue lightning from the point of his sword.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Stay away from Daji,” the King said roughly. “He’ll kill you.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“I came to let you know that we’ve captured Seishen Daji.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Seishen Daji,” Mercy said, “swear on your soul to tell me the truth.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Very well then,” Mercy pronounced. “In the lack of further evidence, this must be nothing more than a personal grudge between Wei Shi Lindon Arelius and Seishen Daji of the Seishen Kingdom.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
